data.description: Data to be displayed in the table
data.name: data

defaultSort.description: Default sorting configuration for the table
defaultSort.name: defaultSort

className.description: Additional class names for custom styling
className.name: className

noDataCaption.description: Caption to display when there is no data
noDataCaption.name: noDataCaption

height.description: Table height (in pixels or null for auto height)
height.name: height

maxHeight.description:
Table max height - the maximum height of the table, if there is little data, the table will not stretch.
The values of height and maxHeight are needed for the stickyHeader to work.
In summary: height is used if the container needs to be strictly fixed in height, and maxHeight - if it is not critical
that the height of the container will change dynamically up to the maximum value
maxHeight.name: maxHeight

loading.description: Whether the table is in loading state (displays skeletons)
loading.name: loading

stickyHeader.description: Whether the table header is sticky when scrolling
stickyHeader.name: stickyHeader

verticalBorder.description: Whether to show vertical borders between columns
verticalBorder.name: verticalBorder
